title: Halliday's New Gen 2 AI Glasses Have a Monochrome HUD Designed for Work
summary: San Francisco-based smart glasses company Halliday just dropped a ton of details about its Gen 2 smart glasses, a set of waveguide display spectacles that project an AI-powered overlay into users' field of view.
